message:
security: make is_expired fail-closed on invalid timestamps

Changed `is_expired` functions in pending_exceptions.rs and cli.rs to
return `true` (expired) for unparseable timestamps instead of `false`
(not expired).

This aligns with the allowlist.rs implementation and provides
defense-in-depth: entries with corrupted or malformed timestamps will
now be treated as expired rather than persisting indefinitely.

Updated test to expect the new secure behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
